contextNotes.jsonConversion: JSON transcripts are converted to clean text format before sending
contextNotes.modelConfig: The model used is configured via TEXT_MODEL_NAME environment variable
contextNotes.tagPrompts: If multiple tag prompts exist, they are merged in the order tags were added
contextNotes.transcriptLimit: Transcripts are limited to a configurable character count (default: 30,000)

adminDashboard.defaultPromptInfo: This default prompt will be used for all users who haven't set their own custom prompt in their account settings.

errors.failedToSavePrompt: Failed to save default prompt. Please try again.
errors.invalidFileSize: Please enter a valid size between 1 and 10000 MB
errors.minCharacters: Please enter a valid number of at least 1000 characters
errors.minTimeout: Timeout must be at least 60 seconds

adminDashboard.inquireModeDescription: Inquire Mode allows users to search across multiple transcriptions using natural language questions. It works by breaking transcriptions into chunks and creating searchable embeddings using AI models.
adminDashboard.languagePreferenceNote: Note: If the user has set an output language preference, " Ensure your response is in {language}." will be added.
adminDashboard.maxFileSizeHelp: Maximum file size in megabytes (1-10000 MB)
adminDashboard.newPasswordLabel: New Password (leave blank to keep current)
adminDashboard.noGroupsAdmin: You are not an admin of any groups yet
adminDashboard.placeholdersNote: Placeholders are replaced with actual values when processing a recording.
adminDashboard.promptDescription: This prompt will be used to generate summaries for all recordings when users haven't set their own prompt.
adminDashboard.promptPriorityDescription: The system uses the following priority order when selecting which prompt to use:
adminDashboard.promptResetMessage: Prompt reset to system default. Click "Save Changes" to apply.
adminDashboard.recordingsNeedProcessing: There are {{count}} recordings that need to be processed for Inquire Mode.

settings.asrTimeoutDesc: Maximum time in seconds to wait for ASR transcription to complete. Default is 1800 seconds (30 minutes).
settings.defaultSummaryPromptDesc: Default summarization prompt used when users have not set their own prompt. This serves as the base prompt for all users.
settings.maxFileSizeDesc: Maximum file size allowed for audio uploads in megabytes (MB).
settings.recordingDisclaimerDesc: Legal disclaimer shown to users before recording starts. Supports Markdown formatting. Leave empty to disable.
settings.uploadDisclaimerDesc: Legal disclaimer shown before file uploads. Supports Markdown. Leave empty to disable.
settings.customBannerDesc: Custom banner shown at the top of the page. Supports Markdown. Leave empty to disable.
settings.transcriptLengthLimitDesc: Maximum number of characters to send from transcript to LLM for summarization and chat. Use -1 for no limit.
settings.maxAudioOnlyVideoSizeDesc: Maximum file size (in MB) for video uploads in audio-only mode. Only the extracted audio is stored, so the upload itself can be larger than the regular file-size limit.

adminDashboard.systemFallbackDesc: A hardcoded default if none of the above are set
adminDashboard.tagCustomPromptDesc: If a recording has tags with custom prompts
adminDashboard.timeoutRecommendation: Recommended: 30-120 minutes for long audio files
adminDashboard.title: Admin Dashboard
adminDashboard.tokenBudgetExceeded: Monthly token budget exceeded. Please contact your administrator.
adminDashboard.tokenBudgetHelp: Set a monthly token limit for AI features. Leave empty for unlimited.
adminDashboard.transcriptionBudgetHelp: Limit transcription minutes per month. Leave empty for unlimited.
adminDashboard.userCustomPromptDesc: If the user has set their own prompt in account settings
adminDashboard.vectorStoreUpToDate: The vector store is up to date.

customPrompts.currentDefaultPrompt: Current Default Prompt (Used if you leave the above blank)
customPrompts.promptDescription: This prompt will be used to generate summaries for your transcriptions. It overrides the admin's default prompt.
customPrompts.promptPlaceholder: Describe how you want your summaries structured. Leave blank to use the admin's default prompt.
customPrompts.tip1: Be specific about the sections you want in your summary
customPrompts.tip2: Use clear formatting instructions (e.g., "Use bullet points", "Create numbered lists")
customPrompts.tip3: Specify if you want certain information prioritized
customPrompts.tip4: The system will automatically provide the transcript content to the AI
customPrompts.tip5: Your output language preference (if set) will be applied automatically

editTagModal.asrSettingsDescription: These settings will be applied by default when using this tag with ASR transcription
editTagModal.colorDescription: Choose a color for easy identification
editTagModal.customPromptPlaceholder: Optional: Custom prompt for generating summaries for recordings with this tag
editTagModal.defaultPromptPlaceholder: Leave empty to use your default summary prompt
editTagModal.exportTemplateHint: Select an export template to use when exporting recordings with this tag
editTagModal.leaveBlankPrompt: Leave blank to use your default summary prompt
editTagModal.namingTemplateHint: Select a naming template to automatically format titles for recordings with this tag
editTagModal.noNamingTemplate: No template (use user default or AI title)
editTagModal.title: Edit Tag
editTagModal.watchFolderGroupTagError: Watch folders are not available for group tags
editTagModal.watchFolderVariableWarning: This tag is set up as a watch folder and the prompt contains placeholder variables. Recordings ingested through the auto-process directory have no UI for users to fill those values, so the placeholders will substitute to empty strings on the first summary run. Either remove the placeholders or fill the values via reprocess after upload.

errors.audioExtractionFailedGuidance: Try converting the file to a standard audio format (MP3, WAV) before uploading.
errors.audioExtractionFailedMessage: Could not extract audio from the uploaded file.
errors.audioRecordingFailed: Audio recording failed. Please check your microphone.
errors.authenticationErrorGuidance: Please check that the API key is correct and has not expired.
errors.authenticationErrorMessage: The transcription service rejected the API credentials.
errors.checkApiKeyGuidance: Check the API key in settings
errors.connectionErrorGuidance: Check your internet connection and ensure the service is available.
errors.connectionErrorMessage: Could not connect to the transcription service.
errors.convertFormatGuidance: Convert to MP3 or WAV before uploading
errors.enableChunkingGuidance: Enable chunking in your admin settings, or lower the per-chunk size if it is already enabled; otherwise compress the source file
errors.fileTooLargeGuidance: Enable audio chunking in your admin settings, or compress the audio file before uploading. If chunking is already enabled the file may still exceed the per-chunk limit.
errors.fileTooLargeMessage: The audio file exceeds the maximum size allowed by the transcription service.
errors.invalidAudioFormatGuidance: Try converting the audio to MP3 or WAV format before uploading.
errors.invalidAudioFormatMessage: The audio file format is not supported or the file may be corrupted.
errors.networkError: Network error. Please check your connection.
errors.processingErrorGuidance: If this error persists, try reprocessing the recording.
errors.processingTimeoutGuidance: This can happen with very long recordings. Try splitting the audio into smaller parts.
errors.processingTimeoutMessage: The transcription took too long to complete.
errors.rateLimitExceededGuidance: Please wait a few minutes and try reprocessing.
errors.rateLimitExceededMessage: Too many requests were sent to the transcription service.
errors.serverError: Server error ({{status}}): Response was not JSON
errors.serviceUnavailableGuidance: This is usually temporary. Please try again in a few minutes.
errors.serviceUnavailableMessage: The transcription service is temporarily unavailable.
errors.splitAudioGuidance: Try splitting the audio into smaller parts
errors.summaryFailed: Summary generation failed. Please try again.
errors.tryAgainLaterGuidance: Try again in a few minutes
errors.unexpectedResponse: Unexpected success response from server after upload.
errors.waitAndRetryGuidance: Wait a few minutes and try again
errors.uploadBlockedByProxyGuidance: Increase client_max_body_size on your reverse proxy; the upload never reached PXE MeetingMitra, so chunking does not apply
errors.shareTargetGeneric: Could not process the shared audio. Please try uploading directly.
errors.shareTarget_missing_file: No audio file was attached to the share. Try selecting the file before sharing.
errors.shareTarget_too_large: The shared audio file is larger than PXE MeetingMitra's upload limit.
errors.shareTarget_save_failed: PXE MeetingMitra could not save the shared audio. Please try uploading directly.
errors.shareTarget_queue_failed: The shared audio was saved but could not be queued for transcription.
errors.recordingFinalizeFallback: Server-side stitch failed; uploading as a single file instead.
errors.recordingNotResumable: That recording can no longer be resumed.

eventExtraction.info: Extracted events will appear in an 'Events' tab on recordings where calendar items are detected.

events.noEvents: No events detected in this recording

folderManagement.autoShareOnApplyHelp: Auto-share recordings with all group members when added to this folder
folderManagement.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this folder? Recordings will be removed from this folder but not deleted.
folderManagement.description: Organize your recordings into folders. Unlike tags, a recording can only belong to one folder. Folder prompts are applied before user prompts but after tag prompts.
folderManagement.noFoldersDescription: Create your first folder to organize your recordings
folderManagement.protectFromDeletionHelp: Protect recordings in this folder from auto-deletion
folderManagement.retentionDaysHelp: Recordings in this folder will be deleted after this many days. Leave empty to use global retention.
folderManagement.shareWithGroupLeadHelp: Share recordings with group admins when added to this folder
folderManagement.title: Folder Management
folderManagement.colorDescription: Choose a color for easy identification
folderManagement.tagPriorityNote: Tag settings take priority over folder settings
folderManagement.retentionPlaceholder: Leave empty to use global retention
folderManagement.retentionHelp: Leave empty to use global retention period.
folderManagement.protectFromDeletionLongHelp: Recordings in this folder will never be automatically deleted.
folderManagement.summaryPromptPlaceholder: Optional: Custom prompt for generating summaries for recordings in this folder
folderManagement.summaryPromptHelp: Leave blank to use your default summary prompt. Tag prompts take priority over folder prompts.
folderManagement.transcriptionModelHelp: Override which transcription model is used for recordings in this folder.
folderManagement.namingTemplateNone: No template (use user default or AI title)
folderManagement.namingTemplateHint: Select a naming template to automatically format titles for recordings in this folder
folderManagement.exportTemplateHint: Select an export template to use when exporting recordings in this folder
folderManagement.groupAssignmentHelp: Assign this folder to a group to enable auto-sharing when recordings are moved to it
folderManagement.autoShareHelp: All group members will automatically get access to recordings in this folder
folderManagement.shareWithAdminsHelp: Only group admins will get access (not all members)
folderManagement.shareModeNote: Note: If both are enabled, all group members will have access.

form.defaultTranscriptionModelHelp: Override which transcription model is used for recordings with this tag or folder.
form.hotwordsHelp: Comma-separated words to improve recognition of domain-specific terms
form.initialPromptHelp: Context to steer the transcription model's style and vocabulary

groups.autoShareNote: Note: If both are enabled, all team members will have access. If only "team admins" is enabled, only group leads will have access.
groups.autoShareTeam: Auto-share recordings with all team members when this tag is applied
groups.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this group? This action cannot be undone.
groups.deletionExemptHelp: Recordings with this tag will be exempt from automatic deletion, even if they exceed the retention period.
groups.retentionHelp: Recordings with this tag will be deleted after this many days. Leave empty to use global retention ({{days}} days).
groups.retentionPlaceholder: Leave empty to use global retention
groups.shareWithAdmins: Share recordings with team admins when this tag is applied
groups.syncTeamSharesDescription: This will retroactively share all recordings that have group tags with the appropriate group members based on the tag's sharing settings.

help.audioDeletedDescription: The audio file for this recording has been deleted, but the transcription remains available.
help.audioDeletedMessage: Audio file has been archived and is no longer available for playback.
help.bothAudioDesc: Records your voice + meeting participants (recommended for online meetings)
help.createPublicLink: Create a public link to share this recording. Sharing is only available on secure (HTTPS) connections.
help.defaultHotwordsHelp: Comma-separated words or phrases that the transcription model should prioritize recognizing (brand names, acronyms, technical terms).
help.defaultInitialPromptHelp: Context to steer the transcription model's style and vocabulary. Describe the topic or expected content of your recordings.
help.firstTagAsrSettings: First tag's ASR settings will be applied:
help.folderHasCustomPrompt: This folder has a custom summary prompt
help.internalSharingDesc: Share with specific users in your organization
help.noSpeakersIdentified: No speakers could be identified from the context.
help.processingTimeDescription: This may take a few minutes to complete. You can continue using the app while processing.
help.publicLinkDesc: Anyone with this link can access the recording
help.recordSystemSteps3: Make sure to check the box that says
help.selectedTagsCustomPrompts: Selected tags include custom summary prompts
help.sharingWindowNoAudio: Sharing a "Window" will not capture audio.
help.speakersUpdatedSaveToApply: Speakers updated! Save the transcript to apply changes.
help.systemAudioDesc: Records meeting participants and system sounds
help.toCaptureAudioFromMeetings: To capture audio from meetings or other apps, you must share your screen or a browser tab.
help.youHaveXSpeakers: You have {{count}} speakers, but only 16 unique colors are available. Colors will repeat after the 16th speaker.

incognito.audioNotStored: Audio not stored in incognito mode
incognito.discardConfirm: This will permanently discard your incognito recording. Continue?

inquire.exampleQuestion2: "When did we decide to change the timeline?"

manageSpeakersModal.speakersWillAppear: Speakers will appear here when you use speaker names in your recordings

messages.copyNotSupported: Copy failed. Your browser may not support this feature.
messages.eventDownloadSuccess: Event "{{title}}" downloaded. Open the file to add to your calendar.
messages.noPermissionToEdit: You do not have permission to edit this recording

modal.resetStatusBody: This will mark the recording as 'Failed'. This is useful if processing is stuck. You will be able to reprocess it afterwards.

namingTemplates.customVarsHint: Define regex patterns below to extract custom variables from filenames.
namingTemplates.description: Define how recording titles are generated from filenames and transcription content.
namingTemplates.regexHint: Extract data from filenames. Use capture groups () to specify the match. Example: (\d{10}) for phone numbers.
namingTemplates.selectOrCreate: Select a template to edit or create a new one
namingTemplates.title: Naming Templates
namingTemplates.userDefaultHint: Applied when no tag has a naming template set.

preferences.description: Display and editor behaviour preferences. These settings are saved to your account and apply across devices.
preferences.editorAutosave: Auto-save edits in the transcript editor
preferences.editorAutosaveHelp: When enabled, edits in the transcript editor are saved automatically a couple of seconds after you stop typing. When disabled (default), you save explicitly via the Save buttons or Ctrl+S.
preferences.showTimestampsSimpleViewHelp: Display a compact mm:ss timestamp next to each speaker label in the simple transcript view. The bubble view is unaffected.

pwa.screenAwake: Screen will stay awake during recording

recording.recoveryDescription: We found an unfinished recording from a previous session. Would you like to restore it?
recording.recoveryServerFound: In-progress recording found on the server
recording.recoveryServerDescription: A recording from this browser was still being saved on the server. You can finish processing it now, or discard it.
recording.systemAudioNotSupported: System audio recording is not supported in this browser
recording.title: Audio Recording
recording.howToEnableFullSystemAudio: how to enable full system audio
recording.tabAudioOnlyTooltip: Tab audio only on this platform — see help
recording.detectedDeviceSuffix: — pick it from the microphone dropdown to route system audio in.
recording.disableAudioProcessingTitle: Disable echo cancellation, noise suppression & auto-gain
recording.disableAudioProcessingHelp: — enable when you're routing system audio in through a monitor source or virtual audio device (BlackHole, VB-Cable, Pulse monitor). Leave off for normal microphone recording.
recording.grantMicPermissionHint: Grant microphone permission once so device names can populate.
recording.mixHelp: Pick a monitor / virtual audio device (BlackHole on macOS, VB-Cable on Windows, or a wrapped Pulse monitor on Linux) to mix system audio with your mic. Both streams combine into one recording.
recording.linuxMonitorHintPrefix: Don't see "Monitor of …" entries? Chrome on Linux filters them out. The help guide's Linux → Option C shows a one-line
recording.linuxMonitorHintSuffix: command to expose a Pulse monitor as a regular source Chrome will list.

reprocessModal.audioReTranscribedFromScratch: The audio will be re-transcribed from scratch. This will also regenerate the title and summary based on the new transcription.
reprocessModal.audioReTranscribedWithAsr: The audio will be re-transcribed using the ASR endpoint. This includes diarization and will regenerate the title and summary.
reprocessModal.manualEditsOverwritten: Any manual edits to the transcription, title, or summary will be overwritten.
reprocessModal.manualEditsOverwrittenSummary: Any manual edits to the summary will be overwritten.
reprocessModal.newTitleAndSummary: A new summary will be generated based on the existing transcription.
reprocessModal.noTagsWithPromptsHint: No tags with custom prompts available. Create tags with custom prompts in the Account Settings.

sharedTranscripts.noSharedTranscripts: You haven't shared any transcripts yet.

sharedTranscriptsPage.noSharedTranscripts: You have not shared any transcripts yet.

speakersManagement.description: Manage your saved speakers. These are automatically saved when you use speaker names in your recordings.

speakersManagement.mergeDescription: Combine multiple speaker profiles into one. All embeddings, snippets, and usage data will be merged.
speakersManagement.speakersWillAppear: Speakers will appear here when you use speaker names in your recordings
speakersManagement.targetWillReceive: The selected speaker will receive all voice data and snippets from the others.

tooltips.followPlayerEnabled: Disable auto-scroll - transcript stays in place

upload.chunking: Large files will be automatically chunked for processing
upload.dropzone: Drag and drop audio files here, or click to browse
upload.duplicateDetected: This file appears to be a duplicate of "{{existingName}}" (uploaded {{existingDate}})
upload.fileExceedsMaxSize: File "{{name}}" exceeds the maximum size of {{size}} MB and was skipped.
upload.invalidFileType: Invalid file type "{{name}}". Only audio files and video containers with audio (MP3, WAV, MP4, MOV, AVI, etc.) are accepted. File skipped.
upload.settingsApplyToAll: Settings apply to all files in this session
upload.supportedFormats: Supports MP3, WAV, M4A, MP4, MOV, AVI, AMR, and more
upload.title: Upload Audio
upload.videoAudioOnlyAuto: Video stream will not be kept.
upload.videoExceedsAudioOnlyMaxSize: Video "{{name}}" exceeds the video upload maximum of {{size}} MB and was skipped.
upload.largeVideoNotice: Large video file. Upload will proceed; transcription may take longer and uses chunking on the server.

promptVariables.title: Prompt variables
promptVariables.hintUpload: The selected tag or folder uses prompt placeholders. Fill these in and they'll be substituted into the summarisation prompt for this recording. Empty values substitute to an empty string. Up to 8,000 characters per value, 32,000 across all variables.
promptVariables.hintReprocess: These values are substituted into placeholders in the resolved prompt. Edits here are saved on the recording. Empty values substitute to an empty string. Up to 8,000 characters per value, 32,000 across all variables.

summaryMode.appendHelp: Use the default prompt and add this as extra context.
summaryMode.replaceHelp: Use only this text as the summarisation instructions.

customizeSummary.title: Customise summary prompt
customizeSummary.body: Add one-off context for this summary, or replace the resolved prompt entirely.

preview.systemReplaced: system-replaced (current date, transcript, tag names, etc.)
preview.liveUpdateNote: The Summarization Instructions slot updates as you edit your custom prompt above. Placeholders are replaced with real values when a recording is processed.

confirms.discardUnsavedRecording: You have an unsaved recording. Leaving will discard it. Continue?

toasts.uploadFailedDownloadedLocally: Upload failed. Audio saved to your Downloads folder for later retry.
toasts.uploadFailedNoRecovery: Upload failed and audio could not be saved locally. Please record again.
toasts.shareTargetReceived: Shared audio received and queued for transcription
toasts.recordingSizeSoftWarning: Recording is {{size}}. Consider stopping when convenient.
toasts.recordingMaxDurationReached: Recording reached the maximum duration and was stopped automatically.
toasts.recordingResumeFound: An in-progress recording from this browser was detected on the server. Resume?

webhooks.title: Webhooks
webhooks.subtitle: Receive HTTP notifications when recordings change. Each endpoint is signed with HMAC-SHA256 so receivers can verify authenticity.
webhooks.secretBannerTitle: Copy this secret now — it will not be shown again
webhooks.secretBannerHint: Sign every receiver request: HMAC-SHA256 of the raw body using this secret. Header: Speakr-Signature: sha256=<hex>

display.audioPlayerPositionLabel: Player position in the recording-detail screen
display.audioPlayerPositionHelp: Choose whether the audio player sits at the bottom of the screen (default) or at the top, just under the recording's title and metadata.
display.playerPositionBottomHelp: Player anchored under the transcript + summary columns. Default.
display.playerPositionTopHelp: Player sits above the columns, just under the title and metadata strip.

stats.title: Stats
stats.speaker: Speaker
stats.noStatsBody: Stats appear once this recording has been transcribed with speaker diarization and segment timestamps.
